Welcome to Our Communications Toolbox

The Communications Toolbox helps Robert Wood Johnson Foundation grantees with communications best practices. See our articles, webinars, toolkits, and more.

 

Featured Resources

Create a Strategic Communications Plan

Designed specifically for foundations and nonprofits, the Smart Chart walks you through six logical steps to create a strategic communications plan. If you have a goal, this tool can help you build a smart strategy to reach it. And if you don’t have

Toolkit

Beginner

Promoting Research, Communication Strategy

Writing for the Web

Tips on how to write web content to advance your cause, position your organization as a thought leader, and help you build relationships with your target audiences.

Article

Beginner

PR and Media

How to Lead a Meeting with a Policymaker

Important things to prepare and do when you meet with policymakers.
